title: Psihosiz (horror)
description: A horror mod focused on psychological dread, paranoia, and atmosphere rather than cheap jump scares. Adds 5 unique creatures, new structures, and a sanity-based "Psychosis" mechanic that alters your perception of reality.
body:
![https://www.twitch.tv/arsstepik228](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2fa1b51ffe9684d42509ae91a15e97e130917a1b.png)
![https://www.donationalerts.com/r/arsstepik228](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44bd200724094414727f96b8b769d8b905b50845.webp)

This mod is a satire of modern horror add-ons, which are overflowing with cheap jump scares and predictable monsters. We poke fun at these clichés by turning them into a core part of the gameplay. No offense intended—just a tribute to the genre and an attempt to look at it from a new angle.

What does the mod add? (Key Features)

PSYCHOSIS (not just "crazy"): Your main enemy is your own perception. The mod affects your in-game state, making you question reality. This isn't just about sounds; it's a game of sanity.

Unique Creatures: 4-5 types of aggressive (and not-so-aggressive) entities. They don't just attack; they behave differently than standard mobs. Forget predictable jumps from the darkness.

Structures & Events: Explore new, grim structures that generate in the world. Each structure can hold either a reward or a deadly danger. Random events will keep you on edge, even in "safe" biomes.

Interactive Objects & Secrets: The world is scattered with deceptive blocks. For example, a block with a smiling face. Tip: Never break it. But if you decide to, remember—it has 100 durability points, so the process will be as agonizing as its consequences.

Why download it?

Tired of monsters jumping out of closets? Here, the horror is built through atmosphere and paranoia.

Want to experience not just the fear of an enemy, but the fear of losing control of your character?

Looking for a fresh take on the Minecraft Horror genre? This mod is an experimental look at what horror in a blocky world could be.

Prepare to doubt every block. Good luck surviving.

— A.S. Studio
